name: lorenz_field_driver
notes: VCV profile intended for Lorenz-driven field testing. VCV Rack channels remain unchanged.
recommended_patch_notes: Use VCV modulation into the existing /ch/1 through /ch/8 rows only.
For Lorenz turbulence testing, route the final modulation to /ch/5.
Keep cvOSCcv IP at 127.0.0.1, out port 9000, in port 7001 unless changed deliberately.
